title: Static first column on dashboard table widget
excerpt: It would be super helpful if the first column (item name) could stay static on the table widgets using on dashboards. It is super hard to follow the item / know if you are making changes on the right item when the name g…

posts.author: annadayton (Anna Dayton)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be super helpful if the first column (item name) could stay static on the table widgets using on dashboards. It is super hard to follow the item / know if you are making changes on the right item when the name goes away when you scroll.

posts.author: rodel (Rodel Villanueva)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, super agree on this request. Hope they’ll include this feature.
